rationale: Codebase-pin check at b641a9fe: `git show --name-only` lists exactly cmd/mindspec/panel.go, cmd/mindspec/panel_test.go, .mindspec/domains/workflow/interfaces.md — no internal/panel|instruct|complete diff.
